# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart deployment template that always pulls the latest container images. Set imagePullPolicy to Always so users get the newest versions. This is for our fast-moving development environment where we deploy multiple times per day.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.appName }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {{ .Values.appName }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: {{ .Values.appName }}
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: {{ .Values.containerName }}
        image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag | default .Chart.AppVersion }}"
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        env:
          # Define the environment variable
          - name: ENV_VARIABLE
            value: {{ .Values.envVariable }}
        imagePullPolicy: Always
